welcome:
Welcome to Muscle Benchmark! 💪

This bot tracks your CrossFit progress and compares you with your friends.

Let's create your profile!
ask_height: What is your height in centimeters? (e.g.: 178)
ask_weight: What is your current weight in kilograms? (e.g.: 75.5)
ask_language: Alege limba / Choose language / Выберите язык:
profile_created:
✅ Profile created successfully!

👤 Name: {name}
📏 Height: {height} cm
⚖️ Weight: {weight} kg

Ready for your first workout!
invalid_height: ❌ Height must be between 100 and 250 cm.
invalid_weight: ❌ Weight must be between 30 and 300 kg.
session_intro:
We'll measure {count} exercises. Be honest — the data is just for you and your group!

Let's go! 💪
input_hint_time: Enter the time in seconds (e.g.: 360 for 6 minutes):
session_summary:
🏁 *Session complete!*

📊 *Your results:*
{results}

⚖️ Weight recorded: {weight} kg
🏆 Session score: *{score}*

Thank you and great job! 💪
reminder_text:
⏰ You forgot to complete today's session!

You still have time to record your progress. Press /start to continue.
already_registered: You're already registered! Use /stats for statistics or /help for help.
not_registered: ❌ You are not registered. Use /start to create a profile.
no_active_session: There is no active session at the moment. An admin needs to trigger one.
session_already_completed: ✅ You have already completed the current session. Great job!
admin_panel:
🔧 *Admin Panel*

Available commands:
/trigger — Trigger new session
/addadmin <id> — Add admin
/removeadmin <id> — Remove admin
/listadmins — List admins
/listusers — List users
trigger_ask_message:
Do you want to add a custom message for the session? (e.g.: 'Monday morning session!')

Or type /skip for a default message.
help:
📖 *Available commands:*

/start — Create profile
/session — Complete current session
/stats — Your statistics
/leaderboard — General leaderboard
/weight — Update your weight
/help — Help

*Admin:*
/trigger — Trigger session
/addadmin — Add admin
/removeadmin — Remove admin
update_weight_prompt: Enter your new weight in kilograms:
